name: obsidian-clio-conv
description: Plugin to manage harmonica tabs and text-formatted music sheets in Obsidian.

scripts.test: npx tsc --outDir .testbuild --module esnext --target es2020 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop true --skipLibCheck true src/conversion.ts test/conversion.test.ts && node .testbuild/test/conversion.test.js
